title: REDUCED SEWER RATE PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF CANBY REDUCED SEWER RATE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a reduced sewer rate. 222 NE 2nd Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: -Low-income households age 65 and older, and adults with disabilities -Maximum annual household adjusted gross income: $24,625 per 1-person household $28,150 per 2-person household $31,675 per 3-person household $35,150 per 4-person household Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 266-0640 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 266-0640 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call or email for more information -Applications available online; completed applications can be mailed or hand-delivered FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of age or proof of disability and copy of the most recent IRS form 1040 or 1040EZ for each person in the household AREA SERVED: City of Canby SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm By appointment only Monday-Friday 8am-9am TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Canby Area Transit (CAT) Services: Discounted Sewer Service * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Discounted Sewer Service * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF CANBY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF CANBY
